rulings.Case Title: NORMA ANN MULLIGAN VS. LIVERPOOL LIL'S INC.
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 4, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT EDWARD SAVINO MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION DENIED in part and moot in part. Motion is moot as to the cause of action for gross negligence, dismissed. Motion is DENIED as to the required for punitive damages. Triable issues of fact exist as to the "malice." Plaintiff to prepare order in compliance with CCP 437c(g). = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: NORMA ANN MULLIGAN VS. LIVERPOOL LIL'S INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Or In The Alternative, Reconsideration
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 4, 2019 line 1. DEFENDANT LIVERPOOL LIL'S INC., GILBERT HODGES MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Or In The Alternative, Reconsideration DENIED in part and moot in part. Motion is moot as to the cause of action for gross negligence, dismissed. Motion is DENIED as to the required for punitive damages. Triable issues of fact exist as to the "malice." Plaintiff to prepare order in compliance with CCP 437c(g). = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: BORREGAS COURT ASSOCIATES, A CALIFORNIA GENERAL VS. BOSTON FINANCIAL INVESTMENT MANAGEMENT A ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Sep 4, 2019 line 2. DEFENDANT BFIM-CALIFORNIA ACQUISITION CORP., ERRONEOUSLY, EDISON CAPITAL HOUSING INVESTMENTS, EDISON CAPITAL HOUSING PARTNERS, XI, LLC Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendant Edison Capital Housing Partners, Xi, Llc For Protective Order Regarding Plaintiff Borregas Court Associates Second And Third Sets Of Special Interrogatories GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is DENIED as to Special Interrogatories 76-97; Motion is otherwise GRANTED. = (501/CFH)
